name: Partially my fault for not wearing hardhat in Provo—can I still get money?

mainEntity.name: Partially my fault for not wearing hardhat in Provo—can I still get money?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, if under 50% at fault in Utah's modified comparative rule.** Recovery reduced proportionally, barred at 50%+.[1] Key factors: (1) Defendants argue your negligence; (2) prove their breach primary; (3) workers' comp unaffected; (4) evidence counters claims.[1][2] Document their violations, get lawyer to fight fault shift. Most partial-fault cases settle favorably.
